for: an individual who is a child
to: have an activity condition imposed on them

conditions.text: the individual is a parent of the child concerned

to: impose an activity condition if it is an excepted order

conditions.text: the child arrangements order is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4))

to: have an activity condition imposed on them

conditions.text: the individual is not habitually resident in England and Wales
the individual subject to the condition ceases to be habitually resident in England and Wales
